holdings.infoBox: WDIV is an equity ETF with a total of 119 individual holdings. The top holdings are Lenovo Group stock at 2.12%, Legal & General Group at 1.74%, Altria Group at 1.70%, Highwoods Properties at 1.68%, and Verizon Communications at 1.64%.

overview.description: The State Street SPDR S&P Global Dividend ETF (WDIV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high dividend yield equity. The fund tracks an index of 100 high-dividend-yielding stocks from the S&P Global BMI Index. Constituents are selected and weighted by dividends. WDIV was launched on May 29, 2013 and is issued by State Street.
infoTable: S&P Global Dividend Aristocrats Index sp_43
